capstone.label: MECH&AE 156A / 156B
capstone.notes: Senior design sequence integrating mechanical systems analysis and design.

nodes.label: MATH 31A
nodes.title: Differential and Integral Calculus
nodes.description: Limits, derivatives, and integrals for engineering applications.

nodes.label: MATH 31B
nodes.title: Integration and Infinite Series
nodes.description: Integration techniques, sequences, and series.

nodes.label: MATH 32A
nodes.title: Calculus of Several Variables
nodes.description: Partial derivatives, gradients, and multivariable integration.

nodes.label: MATH 32B
nodes.title: Calculus of Several Variables II
nodes.description: Line integrals, Green's theorem, and vector calculus.

nodes.label: MATH 33A
nodes.title: Linear Algebra and Applications
nodes.description: Matrices, eigenvalues, and linear systems for engineering.

nodes.label: PHYSICS 1A
nodes.title: Physics for Scientists and Engineers: Mechanics
nodes.description: Kinematics, Newton's laws, energy, and momentum.

nodes.label: PHYSICS 1B
nodes.title: Physics for Scientists and Engineers: Oscillations, Waves, Electric and Magnetic Fields
nodes.description: Oscillations, waves, and introductory electromagnetism.

nodes.label: PHYSICS 1C
nodes.title: Physics for Scientists and Engineers: Electrodynamics, Optics, and Special Relativity
nodes.description: Electrodynamics, optics, and special relativity.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 82
nodes.title: Programming Fundamentals for Engineers
nodes.description: Programming and numerical methods for mechanical engineering problems.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 94
nodes.title: Introduction to Mechanical Engineering
nodes.description: Overview of ME fields, design process, and professional practice.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 103
nodes.title: Engineering Thermodynamics
nodes.description: First and second laws, properties of pure substances, and energy analysis.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 104
nodes.title: Engineering Mechanics: Statics
nodes.description: Equilibrium of particles and rigid bodies, trusses, and frames.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 105A
nodes.title: Engineering Mechanics: Dynamics
nodes.description: Kinematics and kinetics of particles and rigid bodies.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 106A
nodes.title: Mechanics of Deformable Solids
nodes.description: Stress, strain, axial loading, torsion, and bending.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 106B
nodes.title: Mechanics of Deformable Solids II
nodes.description: Advanced solid mechanics and failure analysis.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 156A
nodes.title: Mechanical Systems Design I
nodes.description: Team-based mechanical design project — first quarter of senior capstone sequence.

nodes.label: MECH&AE 156B
nodes.title: Mechanical Systems Design II
nodes.description: Capstone design project completion, prototyping, and documentation.

nodes.label: Design Engineer
nodes.title: Mechanical Design Engineer
nodes.description: Product design, CAD, and prototyping for consumer and industrial hardware.

nodes.label: Robotics Engineer
nodes.title: Robotics Engineer
nodes.description: Mechanisms, controls, and embedded systems for autonomous robots.

nodes.label: Thermal Engineer
nodes.title: Thermal Systems Engineer
nodes.description: HVAC, energy systems, and heat transfer for buildings and vehicles.

nodes.label: Aerospace Engineer
nodes.title: Aerospace / Propulsion Engineer
nodes.description: Structures, propulsion, and vehicle design for aerospace applications.
